title: Lock R4 design baseline and page acceptance matrix
purpose: Freeze the obtainable Operator Console R4 design baseline: source-bundle hash, page/screen inventory, screen->task->E2E acceptance mapping, and branch truth. Record the AI Trading Desk reference zip as an unavailable artifact that does NOT block R4 implementation.

design_source.description: R4 Operator Console design bundle used to seed the ODP-OC-R4-001..012 fleet. The label date (2026-07-07) is the frozen design snapshot; the md5 is the integrity hash the fleet must build against.
design_source.provenance: Off-repo design bundle. The bundle itself is not tracked in this git repository; this receipt records its identity so any reviewer can bind implementation work to the exact design snapshot without relying on chat history.

branch_truth.note: All ODP-OC-R4-001..012 task branches cut from origin/dev at or after this commit. Cutover to main is gated by ODP-OC-R4-011 (product E2E gate) and ODP-OC-R4-012 (staging verify + promote-dev-to-main).

referenced_source_docs.note: Referenced by the R4 task briefs but not tracked in origin/dev at the baseline commit. Fleet execution content is reproduced by this receipt and the implementation matrix so no reviewer depends on the missing file.
Machine-readable twin of the fleet execution doc; also absent from the baseline tree.
Parity audit referenced by the task; absent from the baseline tree. Parity conclusions cannot be re-derived from repo state alone and are therefore NOT asserted here.

unavailable_artifacts.name: AI Trading Desk design zip
unavailable_artifacts.rationale: The AI Trading Desk reference design zip is not available in this repository or the design bundle. Per ODP-OC-R4-000 scope, its absence does NOT block R4 implementation. No parity to the AI Trading Desk design is claimed anywhere in this baseline; any parity statement must wait until the zip is obtained and independently verified.

screen_matrix.screen: Shell (global chrome: header, nav, search, notifications, approvals, Task Center, Ctrl/Cmd+K)
screen_matrix.primary_e2e_assertion: Header counts match API results after writes without a full session reset; keyboard navigation and Ctrl/Cmd+K pass accessibility tests.
All six roles receive distinct allowed workspaces and Today content from bootstrap/today APIs; search and queue selections open the exact entity and tab.

screen_matrix.screen: Store Ops (four-light summary + durable issue lifecycle)
screen_matrix.primary_e2e_assertion: ISS-1024 completes a valid lifecycle and reload shows persisted state; invalid transitions return 409 and duplicate idempotency keys do not duplicate audit rows.

screen_matrix.screen: Growth (three create entries + five-step Draft Builder + conflict gate + lifecycle)
screen_matrix.primary_e2e_assertion: All three entry cards prefill and persist the correct draft type; blocked conflict states cannot submit and return actionable server reasons.

screen_matrix.screen: Network - Find Areas / Expansion Stepper / Listing Radar
screen_matrix.primary_e2e_assertion: HZ-01 to L-2024 to CS-1001 completes through product UI and APIs; converting L-2024 creates CS-1001 once; the real HeatZone map stays nonblank and synchronized with the selected zone/lens.

screen_matrix.screen: Network - Candidate data gate / SiteScore / Compare
screen_matrix.primary_e2e_assertion: CS-1001 returns GO 82 with SiteScore v2.3 and FS-20260704-0600; missing address/geocode/rent/area/floor/hard-rule data blocks scoring server-side.
GO maps to Approved, WAIT to On Hold, Return to Need Data, Reject to Rejected; a failed transaction leaves all five records unchanged and idempotent replay creates no duplicates.

screen_matrix.screen: Network - Rebalance (API-backed AVM + NetPlan three-scenario compare)
screen_matrix.primary_e2e_assertion: AVM and NetPlan results are service outputs with model/snapshot metadata; a selected scenario persists and reloads with evidence and owner; unavailable model/runtime fails closed with an explicit retryable state.

screen_matrix.screen: Govern (Approval, Decision, Audit, Evidence Package, SLA, Data Quality, Model, Connector, Users)
screen_matrix.primary_e2e_assertion: No governance value builder remains unreachable from UI navigation; return/reject require reason and approval policies are enforced server-side; evidence export records scope, range, format, actor, correlation, and retention policy.

enabling_tasks.note: Converges active FIN branches onto origin/dev; fixes /operator React route, modular Operator API, R4 DTOs, deterministic seed, and OpenAPI adapter contracts that every screen depends on.
Applies real auth/RBAC, tenant isolation, replay dedup, immutable audit, camera purpose binding, and observability to every new Operator endpoint.
Makes the per-screen operator-*.spec.ts suite, visual, accessibility, map-pixel, and reload checks mandatory in CI. This is where each screen's E2E assertion becomes enforced.
Runs staging migration/seed/auth/runtime verification, rehearses rollback, and promotes dev to main once all gates are green.

release_blockers.detail: The AI Trading Desk reference zip is unavailable; parity claims are prohibited until it is obtained and verified. Non-blocking to R4 build, blocking to any parity assertion.
As of the baseline commit, ODP-OC-R4-001..012 are all status=todo; screens map to planned (not yet present) operator-*.spec.ts suites.

release_blockers.blocker: Product E2E + staging cutover gates open
release_blockers.detail: Promotion of dev to main is gated by ODP-OC-R4-011 (mandatory product E2E/visual/a11y gate in CI) and ODP-OC-R4-012 (staging verify + rollback rehearsal).
